arts.ttl: Manchester City eyeing 18-year-old ‘great talent’ – City Football Group plan being formulated
arts.sum: Manchester City are one of the sides eyeing up Paris Saint Germain youngster Mahamadou Sangaré, with a potential loan to sister club Troyes in the plans. That’s according to RMC Sport, who say PSG will ‘lose a great talent’ this summer and Manchester City are ready to scoop him up. arts.ttl: Man City vs Leicester live early team news plus kick-off time and how to watch
arts.sum: Manchester City return to Premier League action against strugglers Leicester, hoping to keep their top four hopes going in a fixture they should win.

arts.ttl: Srivaddhanaprabha family stance clear on Leicester City amid FFP admission
arts.sum: King Power International and the Srivaddhanaprabha family have reiterated their commitment to Leicester City following the publication of the financial accounts for the 2023/24 season. The accounts, which were released on Wednesday, showed the club made a loss of £19.4 million in the season in which they were crowned Championship winners and returned to the Premier League at the first attempt.

arts.sum: Manchester City striker Erling Haaland is facing up to seven weeks on the side-lines with his ankle injury.
